title: Chapter 32
content:
Chapter 32: Chapter 32: Incubus Celestial Eyes

After leaving the sect, Damon and the girls began making their way to the nearest city. Azure Cloud City, it was only a few hours away from the Azure Dragon Sect, within walking distance.

Once they arrived at the city, Damon approached the guards who stood by the entrance of the city.

When the guards noticed Damon, accompanied by two beautiful girls, approaching them, they gave each other a shock and envious gaze. They were surprised to see a core disciple of the Azure Dragon Sect.

Damon noticed the shock and envious gazes he was getting from the guards, and he asked them: "Is there a problem?"

"Eh? Ah, no... It’s just that very rare to see a core disciple from Azure Dragon Sect come to this city; it’s an honor to meet a core disciple." The guard explained to him.

"I see, then do we need to pay the entrance fee?" Damon asks the guard.

"No, no, no. Since you all are disciples of Azure Dragon Sect, we will not charge you any fees for the entrance from a disciple of Azure Dragon Sect," the guard said with half a lie to Damon.

"Got it." Damon and the girls gave their thanks before quickly making their way into the city.

When they left, the guards sighed, sounding depressed.

"Aiii... how envious. With his handsome looks, he already has two core disciples of beauty with him. Those two core disciples, probably his woman..."

"Hah! Forget about it. You can dream all day! With your face, you probably stay a virgin until you die!"

"What did you say?! You speak as though you have a better face than me, you dog face! Look in the mirror before you talk!"

The guards then began arguing with each other.

****

They casually strolled around the city while chatting. The place was clean and lively, with many people entering and leaving the stores that made up the streets.

After walking for some time, they decided to take a break. They chose a rather fancy restaurant, and as they walked in.

Their presence instantly attracted the gazes of everybody inside the building before even stepping inside, especially Mio and Mia.

"Young Master, Young Ladies, Welcome. How may I help you? And how many will be visiting today?" They were greeted by the waiter as he bowed towards them.

"For three people, and do you have an empty private room?" he replied as he stepped inside the place.

"Of course, for core disciples of the Azure Dragon Sect, there will always be an empty room for you. Young Master, Young Ladies, this way please..." said the waiter in as polite an attitude as possible as he guided them toward the room.

Damon nodded and followed the waiter.

When they arrived at the room, they went to order the food. Damon looks at the menu but doesn’t know what is good.

"Give me your recommendation and your best Spiritual Tea. How about you guys?" Damon asks the girls.

"I’ll do the same, but I want some spirit wine. What about you, Mia?" Mio asked her sister.

"I will order the same with you," she said with her usual small voice.

"The order will come in a few minutes. If you need anything, just call me." The waiter said as he left the room.

Meanwhile, Damon took his time to chat with the twins.

"So, core disciple really awesome, huh... I can see everyone gaze at you guys."

"It’s not like that, it’s just a core disciple rarely seen in this city, because most of the core disciples either have a flying sword or a flying ship that the sect provides. So, we rarely go into this city, even though this city is under sect control." Mio explained to Damon.

"I see, then after this, where are we going?"

"We are going to rent a carriage and stop at the next city, Swift Feather City, to spend a night there, then continue the next day to Crimson Moon City," Mia explains that now she is not too shy with Damon.

Seeing Mio getting more casual with him and Mia not shy anymore, it makes him think.

’Looks like upgrading the Incubus lord makes my Incubus Aura get stronger passively.’

Then he remembered something he hadn’t tested: the Incubus Celestial Eyes, another function. He activated the ability in the girls.

Their status pops out.

[Name: Mio Nightrider]

[Age: 23]

[Cultivation: Earth Spirit Realm - Fourth Level]

[Relationship: Taking an interest]

[Interest: 85/100]

[Chastity: Intact]

[Lust: 0/100]

[Affinities: Dark: 50, Bow: 20]

[Spiritual Roots: Void Spiritual Roots] [Earth Grade - High]

[Bloodline: N/A]

[Physique: N/A]

[Traits: Cheerful, Natural Archer, Loyal, Airhead, Big-Sister, Hidden Desire]

[Desire: "I want to feel that feeling again from Damon’s massage... and that girl seems to really feel good, does sex really feel good?"]

Looking at the status, he was shocked by the new tab.

’

I can see her desire... Looks like the Incubus touch is really powerful. She now also getting the Hidden Desire trait like Ariel.’

Then he looks at Mia’s status.

[Name: Mia Nightrider]

[Age: 23]

[Cultivation: Earth Spirit Realm - Fourth Level]

[Relationship: In Love]

[Interest: 100/1000]

[Chastity: Intact]

[Lust: 0/100]

[Affinities: Dark: 50, Dagger: 20]

[Spiritual Roots: Shadow Spiritual Roots] [Earth Grade - High]

[Bloodline: N/A]

[Physique: N/A]

[Traits: Shy, Natural Assassin, Loyal, Intelligent, Love Handsome Face, Closet Pervert]

[Desire: "I want to be ravaged like that girl from last time...]

’What the... Look like I was awakened something inside Mia... And she was already in love with me; the notification must be buried under the other notifications after I had sex with Ariel.’

Seeing their new status, Damon’s lips spread into a grin as he planned something to make them his. Then he heard a ding.

[Ding!]

[Mission: Claim the Twin of Nightrider’s Chastity.]

[Reward: 100,000 lust points.]

[Bonus Mission: Have a Threesome with Nightrider Sisters]

[Bonus Reward: Compatible Bloodline and physique for Mio Nightrider and Mia Nightrider]

[Time Limit: Before going back to Azure Dragon Sect.]

’Well, that new... A bonus mission, and the reward is good... Damon lost in thought.’

Then Damon snapped back to reality when he heard a knock.

"Young Master, Young Ladies, your order has arrived..."
